purpose: This workbook aggregates and summarizes actuarial reserve data for worksite life insurance products. It calculates statutory, tax, and GAAP reserves, as well as face amounts and cash values, by referencing a centralized raw data warehouse.

tables.business_purpose: Calculates the statutory reserve balances by aggregating gross reserves and adjusting for third-party YRT reinsurance.
inter_table_relationships: References 'Warehouse Data' for base calculations and provides input to 'Exhibit 5' for final reporting.

columns.definition: The specific insurance plan identifier used to filter the warehouse data.
The descriptive name of the insurance product line.
The internal financial accounting code associated with the product.

columns.formula_pattern: SUM(Warehouse Data[Statutory Reserves - Total]) WHERE [Accounting Date = '12/31/2025'] GROUP BY [Triton Plancode]-SUM(Warehouse Data[Statutory Reserves - Rider Subtotal]) WHERE [Accounting Date = '12/31/2025'] GROUP BY [Triton Plancode]
columns.definition: The total statutory reserve before reinsurance adjustments, derived from warehouse columns L and M.

ultimate_raw_sources: Warehouse Data :: Statutory Reserves - Rider Subtotal

columns.formula_pattern: SUM(Warehouse Data[Reinsurance Statutory - Reserve - Total]) WHERE [Accounting Date = '12/31/2025'] GROUP BY [Triton Plancode]+SUM(Warehouse Data[Recapture Statutory - Reserve - Total]) WHERE [Accounting Date = '12/31/2025'] GROUP BY [Triton Plancode]
columns.definition: The portion of the reserve ceded to third-party reinsurers via Yearly Renewable Term (YRT) agreements.

ultimate_raw_sources: Warehouse Data :: Reinsurance Statutory - Reserve - Total
Warehouse Data :: Recapture Statutory - Reserve - Total

columns.formula_pattern: -1 * SUM(Warehouse Data[Captive Statutory - Reserve - Total]) WHERE [Accounting Date = '12/31/2025'] GROUP BY [Triton Plancode]
columns.definition: The final statutory reserve amount after accounting for reinsurance cessions.

ultimate_raw_sources: Warehouse Data :: Captive Statutory - Reserve - Total

tables.business_purpose: Calculates the tax-basis reserves required for regulatory reporting.
inter_table_relationships: References 'Warehouse Data' specifically for tax-related reserve columns.

columns.definition: Dimension label identifying the row taxonomy for Plan.
Dimension label identifying the row taxonomy for Product.
Dimension label identifying the row taxonomy for People Soft Code.
Raw source value or input column for Gross Reserve.
Raw source value or input column for 3rd Party YRT.

columns.formula_pattern: -1 * SUM(Warehouse Data[Captive Tax - Reserve - Total 2018]) WHERE [Accounting Date = '12/31/2025'] GROUP BY [Triton Plancode]
columns.definition: The net tax reserve calculated by applying a negative multiplier to the warehouse tax reserve data.

ultimate_raw_sources: Warehouse Data :: Captive Tax - Reserve - Total 2018

tables.business_purpose: Summarizes the Generally Accepted Accounting Principles (GAAP) reserve liabilities for the specified products.
inter_table_relationships: Provides net GAAP reserve totals to 'Exhibit 5'.

columns.definition: Dimension label identifying the row taxonomy for Plan.
Dimension label identifying the row taxonomy for Product.
Dimension label identifying the row taxonomy for People Soft Code.

columns.formula_pattern: SUM(Warehouse Data[GAAP Reserve - Total]) WHERE [Accounting Date = '12/31/2025'] GROUP BY [Triton Plancode]
columns.definition: The total GAAP reserve liability before reinsurance adjustments.

columns.formula_pattern: SUM(Warehouse Data[Reinsurance GAAP - Reserve - Total]) WHERE [Accounting Date = '12/31/2025'] GROUP BY [Triton Plancode]+SUM(Warehouse Data[Recapture GAAP - Reserve - Total]) WHERE [Accounting Date = '12/31/2025'] GROUP BY [Triton Plancode]
columns.definition: The GAAP reserve amount ceded to third-party reinsurers.

ultimate_raw_sources: Warehouse Data :: Reinsurance GAAP - Reserve - Total
Warehouse Data :: Recapture GAAP - Reserve - Total

columns.definition: The sum of gross reserves and ceded reserves representing the net GAAP liability.

ultimate_raw_sources: Warehouse Data :: Reinsurance GAAP - Reserve - Total
Warehouse Data :: Recapture GAAP - Reserve - Total

tables.business_purpose: Summary report showing Gross Face, 3rd Party YRT, Net Face grouped by Plan, Product, People Soft Code.

columns.definition: Dimension label identifying the row taxonomy for Plan.
Dimension label identifying the row taxonomy for Product.
Dimension label identifying the row taxonomy for People Soft Code.

columns.formula_pattern: SUM(Warehouse Data[Face Amount - Base]) WHERE [Accounting Date = '12/31/2025'] GROUP BY [Triton Plancode]
columns.definition: Aggregated sum of Face Amount - Base, Accounting Date, Triton Plancode from Warehouse Data grouped by Plan, Product, People Soft Code.

columns.formula_pattern: -1 * SUM(Warehouse Data[Face Amount - Ceded]) WHERE [Accounting Date = '12/31/2025'] GROUP BY [Triton Plancode]
columns.definition: Aggregated sum of Face Amount - Ceded, Accounting Date, Triton Plancode from Warehouse Data grouped by Plan, Product, People Soft Code.

columns.formula_pattern: Face Amount[Gross Face]+Face Amount[3rd Party YRT]
columns.definition: Calculated value based on logic: Face Amount[Gross Face]+Face Amount[3rd Party YRT].

computation_params.expression: Face Amount[Gross Face]+Face Amount[3rd Party YRT]

tables.business_purpose: Summary report showing Cash Value grouped by Plan, Product, People Soft Code.

columns.definition: Dimension label identifying the row taxonomy for Plan.
Dimension label identifying the row taxonomy for Product.
Dimension label identifying the row taxonomy for People Soft Code.

columns.formula_pattern: SUM(Warehouse Data[Cash Value - General Account]) WHERE [Accounting Date = '12/31/2025'] GROUP BY [Triton Plancode]
columns.definition: Aggregated sum of Accounting Date, Cash Value - General Account, Triton Plancode from Warehouse Data grouped by Plan, Product, People Soft Code.

ultimate_raw_sources: Warehouse Data :: Cash Value - General Account

tables.business_purpose: Summary report showing Count grouped by Plan, Product, People Soft Code.

columns.definition: Dimension label identifying the row taxonomy for Plan.
Dimension label identifying the row taxonomy for Product.
Dimension label identifying the row taxonomy for People Soft Code.

columns.formula_pattern: COUNT(Warehouse Data) WHERE [Accounting Date = '12/31/2025'] GROUP BY [Triton Plancode]
columns.definition: Aggregated count of records from Warehouse Data matching row criteria.

tables.business_purpose: The final reporting table that breaks down net reserves by section (e.g., Base, ADB) for statutory and GAAP purposes.
inter_table_relationships: Consolidates net reserve values from the 'STAT Reserve' and 'GAAP Reserve' tables.

columns.definition: Dimension label identifying the row taxonomy for Section Desc.
Dimension label identifying the row taxonomy for Section.

columns.formula_pattern: STAT Reserve[Net Reserve]-SUM(STAT Reserve Net Reserve)
columns.definition: The net statutory reserve allocated to specific policy sections.

columns.formula_pattern: GAAP Reserve[Net Reserve]-SUM(GAAP Reserve Net Reserve)
columns.definition: The net GAAP reserve allocated to specific policy sections.
Raw source value or input column for .

loop across derived column and create those columns
columns.definition: Raw source value or input column for Logical step.
Raw source value or input column for AI/Non-AI.

sample_values: Python library name - it will extract this info from VBA
columns.definition: Raw source value or input column for Non-AP Approach.
Raw source value or input column for AI Approach.
